message:
fix(clippy): resolve remaining workspace-wide clippy warnings

- coalesce.rs: allow too_many_lines on execute_or_join (105 lines)
- integrity_guard.rs: use const assertions for compile-time constants,
  fix Duration suboptimal unit warning
- messaging.rs: avoid PI approximation in test, use char patterns
- query_integration.rs: inline format args in set_reservation_released_ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
